description: Create a reproducible, parametrized reporting workflow for airline flight delays using the nycflights13 package. Develop a parametrized RMarkdown template at /home/ga/RProjects/airline_template.Rmd that accepts a carrier parameter to filter the flights dataset, joins with the airlines table to display the full airline name, and includes a summary table (count, mean arrival delay, % late) and a plot of daily average delays. Use an automation script at /home/ga/RProjects/render_reports.R to programmatically generate two HTML reports: /home/ga/RProjects/report_UA.html for United Airlines (UA) and /home/ga/RProjects/report_DL.html for Delta Air Lines (DL).
